description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a low, angular profile and a prominent main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The hull features sloped armor panels for increased deflection and protection, with visible hatches and possible observation ports on the upper surfaces. The vehicle rides on a set of robust, continuous tracks with multiple road wheels, providing high mobility over rough terrain. The turret is equipped with a long-barreled gun and an additional smaller mount, likely for a machine gun or sensor system. The exterior is finished in a dark, matte color scheme, with no visible camouflage or military insignia. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and urban combat capability.
description: A dark, angular tracked combat vehicle with a large turret-mounted cannon and sloped armor panels, designed for heavy protection and firepower.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped glacis plate, narrow profile, and the main gun barrel extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long tracks, multiple road wheels, and the full length of the main cannon.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor, engine deck, and the vehicle's wide, sturdy stance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the turret, tracks, and the angular armor layout.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret and one smaller mount (likely for a machine gun) on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; angular panels for deflection; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green and black color scheme; no visible camouflage pattern.
